title: Restructure the vet-market note answer-first
guidance: Reward an answer-first structure with clean, well-nested bullets. Penalise keeping the build-up or burying the recommendation.

runner_input.instruction: Restructure the note below so the recommendation leads, then the supporting arguments with their evidence.
runner_input.constraints: Output: markdown — a bold recommendation on the first line, then nested bullets (top-level claims, with evidence indented beneath each).

source_blocks.text: There are ~5,300 practices, ~70% already on software, a £271m SAM growing 9%. The incumbents are on-premise with NPS ~12 and no recent release. A 2025 RCVS digital-record guideline raises the compliance bar. So the market is both sizeable and displaceable, and a cloud-native entrant with a compliance angle can win. Therefore we should back the cloud challenger.

rubric_notes: Line 1: back the cloud challenger — market is sizeable and displaceable.
